calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Angie Diner, CSR 9581. Telephone: 415-551-0612.

Deborah L. Goodman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Joseph Eboli, who was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Mark Twyman.
Default was entered against defendant on August 25, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 25, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Joseph Eboli, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mark Twyman, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $77,528.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,121.51.
Attorney Fees - $1,250.00.
Costs - $555.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $80,454.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
